prompt: Create a seven-panel executive carousel for 'Agentic AI Requires Human Oversight Architecture'. Panels: 1 title; 2 autonomy changes the risk model; 3 autonomy is not maturity; 4 oversight must be designed; 5 consequence-based control points; 6 telemetry makes governance real; 7 operating principle: the more the system can do, the clearer its limits must be. Use vendor-neutral AI governance visuals.
proof_boundaries: Do not imply capabilities of specific current AI products.
Do not claim quantified safety, reliability, or business outcomes.
Do not imply one oversight model fits every risk class.
